name: spoke
description: SPOKE protocol monorepo — JSON Schema SSOT with generated TypeScript and Rust types

scripts.verify-codegen: pnpm run codegen && git diff --exit-code -- packages/spoke-schemas/src/generated crates/spoke-schemas/src/generated
scripts.ci:typescript: pnpm run build:schema && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build:operations
